description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a predominantly matte black finish and subtle metallic highlights. The body is angular and robust, featuring a thick, squared-off barrel with a visible muzzle and a rail system along the top for potential attachments. The grip is ergonomic, with a pronounced trigger guard and a pistol-style handle, suggesting ease of handling in close-quarters urban environments. Small red and metallic accents are visible on the body, adding to its modern, tactical appearance. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a durable yet lightweight feel. The design lacks a traditional stock, instead opting for a compact, pistol-grip configuration.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a matte black finish, angular body, and pistol-style grip, featuring a thick barrel and tactical rail system.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the angular body, pistol grip, and rail system on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thick, octagonal barrel opening and the symmetry of the upper rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip, trigger guard, and additional red and metallic details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel and rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a thick, octagonal muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with a robust, reinforced appearance
